summary_one_line: Input must carry a protocol/header token that exactly matches a curl literal so the case-insensitive compare loop runs to completion (false side).

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A byte run that equals (case-insensitively) one of the protocol/header string literals Curl_strncasecompare is called with — e.g. an HTTP-version token "HTTP/" or scheme token "pop3" — so every character in the loop matches and the loop falls through to the false (loop-exit) branch instead of breaking on a mismatch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds embed clean ASCII protocol literals: offsets 0x24-0x29 spell "HHTTP/"/"GHTTP/" and 0x06-0x08 spell "pop"/"pop3", and the loser-vs-winner byte-diff at those offsets shows the winner concentrated on the exact literal bytes (e.g. 0x25 H, 0x26 T, 0x27 T, 0x28 P, 0x29 /). Matching the literal makes Curl_raw_toupper(*first)==Curl_raw_toupper(*second) hold every iteration, so the loop exits via the while-condition (max/string exhausted) — the false branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds at the same offsets carry mutation noise (runs of 0x25 '%', 0x2b '+', 0x2e '.') rather than the protocol literal, so the very first character compared mismatches, Curl_raw_toupper differs, and execution hits the break (line 127->128, true side) before the loop can complete.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc intercept the strcase comparison and record both operands (the input byte and the curl literal) in the CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace then substitutes the literal operand into the input at the matching offset, manufacturing the exact-match token that naive/value_profile must instead stumble onto via blind havoc. The technique delta on both decisive pairs is I2S, and the vpc winner lineage shows I2S-floor dash rows.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique only.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog>value_profile, also delta I2S.
The blocking branch is the false side of a case-insensitive compare loop.
The loop breaks as soon as an uppercased character pair mismatches, so completing the loop (false side) requires every compared char to match.
Winner inputs carry a clean "HTTP/" protocol literal at offsets 0x24-0x29.
Winners concentrate on the literal '/' byte at offset 0x29 while losers are noise there.
Winner seeds embed the ASCII protocol token "pop"/"HTTP/" and "TranSfe" header text.
Loser seeds carry runs of '%' mutation noise rather than a matchable literal.
cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace which substitutes a recorded CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S stage so it must find the exact literal by blind havoc.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile likewise has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
The winner resolved on all 10 trials while the loser blocked all 10, with hitcount 66 vs 0.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=66  loser=0

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 399 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 095209cade8bf193` and observed the I2S-floor signal: 2 ancestor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 23 and 24, direct lower-bound evidence of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the winning vpc lineage. The four cmplog winning seeds (017423e94c217ba2, 1d9d678b6253009f, 054a689b9dd21854, 0429edfc621de054) showed all-havoc chains within their 50 recorded levels, so the floor confirmation rests on the vpc seed; cmplog I2S finds may have leaked into the havoc bucket.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness exposing this exact-match strcase gate where cmplog/vpc resolve the false branch no faster than naive/value_profile (no I2S dose-response separation), which would refute that I2S literal substitution is what unlocks the branch.

weakest_evidence_point: The cmplog winners' lineage chains are all-havoc within the 50 recorded levels, so the I2S-floor confirmation comes only from the vpc seed; cmplog I2S contribution is inferred from the technique delta rather than directly observed in those chains.
